status.unsavedHint: Make sure to save before leaving this page.
status.allSavedHint: Update your preferences whenever you need.

validation.title: Check your input
validation.message: Some fields have invalid values. Please review the helper messages.

hero.description: Track income and expenses, write markdown notes, run Pomodoro sessions, and manage subscriptions — all from a single integrated dashboard.

features.title: Tools you need, in one interface
features.description: Each module works on its own but shares the same data, theme, and language settings

finance.title: Income & expense tracking
finance.description: Log transactions per category, see monthly stats, and track budget progress at a glance

salary.title: Salary deduction calculator
salary.description: Enter your salary and get social insurance, income tax, and local tax computed for take-home pay

subscription.title: Subscription manager
subscription.description: Recurring payments appear in a cashflow calendar with upcoming charges highlighted

notes.title: Markdown notes
notes.description: Organize with folders and tags, attach files, and start quickly with reusable templates

productivity.title: Productivity widgets
productivity.description: Place a Pomodoro timer, stopwatch, sticky notes, and a daily checklist on your dashboard

i18n.title: Korean & English
i18n.description: The full UI is available in both languages, with currency and timezone preferences too

useCases.title: How people use it
useCases.description: From a light personal budget to a focused work tool — use only what you need

expense.title: Monthly budgeting
expense.description: Log transactions alongside category budgets, then watch monthly stats reveal spending patterns

note.title: Meeting & study notes
note.description: Markdown plus folders and tags makes searching and revisiting fast

focus.title: Focused work sessions
focus.description: Track today's tasks with a Pomodoro timer and a daily checklist

subscriptions.title: Subscription visibility
subscriptions.description: Centralize OTT and SaaS subscriptions to see monthly cashflow ahead of time

cta.title: Start light, today
cta.description:
Sign up with email and password,
or jump in with a Google account.
